summary: Iteration 54 - All 3 critical bug fixes verified: 1) Login infinite loop fixed - apiFetch clears both nx_admin_token AND nx_auth on 401, 2) Dashboard stats showing real data (71 leads, 27 bookings, 3 chats) - API returns leads_total field, 3) No hooks error during navigation - hooks moved before conditional return. All 13 backend tests passed, all 8 frontend tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 verified all 3 critical bug fixes: 1) Login loop - both nx_auth and nx_admin_token are now cleared on 401 and on logout. UnifiedLogin.js validates token via API before auto-redirect. 2) Dashboard stats - API returns leads_total (71), leads_new (5), bookings_total (27), chat_sessions_total (3). 3) Hooks error - monitorData, monitorLoading, sidebarOpen hooks moved before conditional return in Admin.js. Navigation between Dashboard, Leads, Customers, Calendar, Monitoring works without crashes.

frontend_ui_tests: Fresh login page loads (no auto-redirect loop) - PASSED
Login flow (email → role choice → password → admin) - PASSED
Dashboard stats show real data (71, 5, 27, 3) - PASSED
Recent leads table shows 10 rows - PASSED
Stale token handling (invalid token → 401 → cleared → login form) - PASSED
Navigation between views (no hooks error) - PASSED
Customer casefile opens with 8 tabs - PASSED
Logout clears both storage keys and redirects to /login - PASSED
Visiting /admin after logout redirects to /login - PASSED

login_loop_fix.issue: Login infinite loop caused by stale nx_auth in localStorage not being cleared on 401
login_loop_fix.verification: Set invalid token → reload → stayed on /login, both storage keys cleared

dashboard_stats_fix.issue: Dashboard stats showing 0 due to API field name mismatch

hooks_error_fix.issue: React hooks error (fewer hooks rendered) during navigation
hooks_error_fix.fix_location: Admin.js lines 118-120 (hooks moved before conditional return)
hooks_error_fix.verification: Navigated between Dashboard, Leads, Customers, Calendar, Monitoring without crashes

screenshots.02_admin_dashboard: Dashboard with stats (71, 5, 27, 3) and recent leads table
screenshots.03_stale_token_test: Login page after invalid token validation
screenshots.04_navigation_test: Dashboard after navigating through all views
